Label: Living
Function: Normal: lights state/toggle (short) / 100% white (long).  Snake-select mode: 1-minute timer.
Notes: on_press first checks millis() < snake_select_until_ms. If yes, snake-arm script runs; otherwise records press_start_b1 + arms long_press_b1. Short (<0.8s normal): 1st press shows state "Liv  on/off" via binary_sensor.living_room_any_light_on, repeat within 8s toggles. The togL feedback gets auto-replaced with the new state once HA reports back via the sensor's on_state callback. Long (>=0.8s normal): brightness 100% color_temp 4000K.

Label: Bio
Function: Normal: lights state/toggle (short) / 100% white (long).  Snake-select mode: 2-minute timer.
Notes: Same wrapper pattern as Button 1, including the on_state-driven togL->new-state refresh.

Label: Bedroom
Function: Normal: lights state/toggle (short) / 100% white (long).  Snake-select mode: 3-minute timer.

Label: Parents
Function: Normal: lights state/toggle (short) / 100% white (long).  Snake-select mode: 4-minute timer.
Notes: Now matches the B1-B3 lights pattern (was previously a single-press 'turn off' that didn't show state). Uses press_start_b4 + long_press_b4 + binary_sensor.parents_bedroom_any_light_on, with the same on_state togL->state refresh.

Label: Cal
Function: Normal: calendar cycle (short) / open snake select-window (long).  Snake-select mode: 5-minute timer.
Target / Entity: calendar OR open snake select OR arm_snake_timer mins=5
Notes: on_press wrapper: in select mode acts as "5 minutes"; otherwise on_release runs the normal short path. Long-press B5 sets snake_select_until_ms = millis() + 5000 (and shows the "btn 1-8N" prompt on the display) or cancels a running snake. While in select mode the calendar jump is skipped.

Label: Set Tmp
Function: Normal: inside-temp / 23 / 20 / 17 cycle (short).  Hot water boost 2h (long).  Snake-select: 6-minute timer.
Target / Entity: input_number.sam_desired_temperature OR input_button.hot_water_boost_2h OR arm_snake_timer mins=6
Notes: Short press on_release runs temp cycle. Long press (>=800ms via long_press_b6) fires hot_water_boost_2h and shows "hot ON " for 3s.

Label: Lily
Function: Normal: +0.5 pouch (short) / -1 pouch long (floor 0).  Snake-select: 7-minute timer.
Notes: Short press adds 0.5 to lily_pouch_count; display shows time-since on left and count on right for 4s. Long press subtracts 1. Count resets at local midnight.

Label: Notify
Function: Normal: notification cycle (short) / dismiss (long).  Snake-select: 8-minute timer.
Notes: on_press wrapper: in select mode acts as "8 minutes"; otherwise records press_start_b8 + arms long_press_b8. Short press extends notify_hold_until_ms for full scroll.
